closed_world.value: Sierra Canyon private school in Los Angeles and wealthy social circle
closed_world.quote: I go to a mostly private school called Sierra Canyon in Los Angeles

investigator.quote: We are the richest people on the block. My father is a lawyer, and my mother is a model

red_herring.value: Missing party binder creates false panic - initially thought forgotten by maid but found in backseat
red_herring.quote: Alisa, my personal maid, hasn't packed my party binder... I find it sitting in the backseat

social_world.value: Elite private school hierarchy with wealth-based status distinctions and competitive social positioning
social_world.quote: We are the richest people on the block... I know people are jealous of me and everything I have

media_and_audience.value: Social reputation management through controlled narrative - narrator shapes perception of herself and others
media_and_audience.quote: Girls who are jealous of her call her a slut, but she is the cleanest slut in the whole school

investigator_wound.value: Narcissistic perfectionism and need for control - vulnerability to having flawless image disrupted
investigator_wound.quote: In my family, anything less is unacceptable... anyone with standards lesser than mine are underachievers
